events.title: Pilates in the Park
events.address: 4230 Shore Acres Blvd NE, St. Petersburg, FL
events.description: Join Healthy St. Pete for a refreshing full-body Pilates workout in the open air focusing on controlled movements to strengthen the core, improve flexibility, and enhance overall body alignment. Participation is free and open to all levels of fitness.
